title: Market Brief — Friday, May 1, 2026
summary: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit at 85% availability (oversupply), H100s at 70%, and MI300X at 60%, while cutting-edge silicon is scarce with H200 at 45%, B200 at just 25% on the threshold of scarcity, and GB200 in severe shortage at 10% availability. B200 OCPI at $5.02/hr with 57.8% annualized volatility is the loudest price signal — demand is surging with utilization rocketing 42.4pp in 30 days to 91.6%, and H200 is already maxed at 100%.
paragraphs: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit at 85% availability (oversupply), H100s at 70%, and MI300X at 60%, while cutting-edge silicon is scarce with H200 at 45%, B200 at just 25% on the threshold of scarcity, and GB200 in severe shortage at 10% availability. B200 OCPI at $5.02/hr with 57.8% annualized volatility is the loudest price signal — demand is surging with utilization rocketing 42.4pp in 30 days to 91.6%, and H200 is already maxed at 100%.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), Llama 70B inference runs roughly $9.48/M on A100, $9.84/M on H100, and $11.90/M on MI300X — meaning DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.378/M output and Meta Llama 4 Maverick at $0.60/M are selling at catastrophic losses exceeding $9/M tokens on legacy GPUs. DeepSeek: Burning Cash. Meta: Burning Cash. OpenAI grades Neutral on GPT-5 tiers but Strong on o3 Pro at $80/M output; Anthropic grades Strong on Opus, Neutral on Sonnet; Google grades Weak with Gemini 2.5 Pro underpriced at $10/M.

B200 compute is undervalued — 25% availability, utilization at 91.6% and climbing fast, yet spot median sits at $4.20/hr versus $5.02 OCPI, implying 16% upside to fair value. Overvalued: A100 capacity at $0.90/hr spot with 85% availability and flat utilization is dead money — sell A100 exposure, go long B200 and H200 futures ahead of the next capacity squeeze.
bullets: 10% GB200 availability signals severe shortage in next-gen Blackwell compute.
25% B200 availability with 42.4pp utilization surge in 30 days marks the tightest supply inflection in the stack.
$0.378/M output from DeepSeek V3.2 implies a per-token loss exceeding $9/M against TCO-adjusted A100 inference cost.
80.5% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI is the highest across all GPU classes.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch.
$80/M output for o3 Pro makes it 211x more expensive than DeepSeek V3.2 per output token.
